name: Full project folder onboarding
description: Index and classify a complete project folder with drawings, specs, RFIs, and submittals (Holabird Academy K-8 School, Baltimore MD)

inputs.user_prompt: Set up this construction project â€” index all files and tell me what we have

expected_behavior: Detects presence or absence of .construction/ directory
Reads project name, number, and location from title block
Walks directory tree and inventories all files
Correctly classifies document types by folder name and filename patterns
Identifies drawing disciplines from sheet prefixes
Reports a coherent summary to the user
ground_truth_notes: Manually classified each file: path, expected_document_type, expected_discipline

classification_accuracy.description: Percentage of files correctly classified by document type

discipline_accuracy.description: Percentage of drawings correctly assigned to a discipline

project_context.description: Percentage of project_context.yaml fields correctly filled

summary_quality.description: Human rates summary usefulness and accuracy 1-5
